product.name: ArNeo Color

product.titleDescriptor: Fabric for Safety Jackets Non Neon Colors
descriptions: ArNeo Color is a 100% polyester, 120 g/m² warp knitted fabric.
It used for jackets with reflective stips.
As its is a jacket with non neon color it has mostly corporate usage than security applications.
Fabric for Safety Jackets Non Neon Colors
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
